name: Fettucini & Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon To 1/2 teaspoon hot pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the pasta until al dente, 10 to 12 minutes.
2. Drain the pasta in a colander and set aside.
3. In a large non-stick skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
4. Add minced garlic and cook for about 1 minute.
5. Add sliced mushrooms and cook until they are browned and softened, about 5 minutes.
6. Stir in the white wine, lemon juice, hot pepper flakes, and salt.
7. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until it has evaporated, about 10 minutes.
8. Stir in the remaining oil, pepper, and chopped parsley.
9. Remove from heat and add the cooked pasta to the skillet, tossing to combine.
10. Serve over low heat.
